title: TodoMVC — add todos and complete one
flow: Add a todo called Buy milk, then add a second todo called Walk the dog. Check the counter shows 2 items left. Mark Buy milk completed via its checkbox. Check the counter shows 1 item left and Buy milk is completed.

vars.flow: Add a todo called Buy milk, then add a second todo called Walk the dog. Check the counter shows 2 items left. Mark Buy milk completed via its checkbox. Check the counter shows 1 item left and Buy milk is completed.

note: A deterministic public test app — exercises add + toggle + counter assertions.
